---
title: "Título del informe"
subtitle: "Subtítulo del informe"
author: "Jesús F. García Gavilán"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%d/%m/%Y')`"
lang: es
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    css: style.css
    df_print: paged
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    fig_caption: true
    includes:
      in_header: preambulo.tex
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: 80
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("report_theme.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.width = 8,
  fig.height = 5,
  dpi = 300
)
